description: Source of truth for Nolty's scheduled crons. Copy this file to cron-jobs.json (gitignored) and edit. The cron-runner LaunchAgent wakes every 15 min and dispatches due jobs into Nolty's tmux session as Task sub-agents.

jobs.name: Heartbeat
jobs.description: Every 30 min — Nolty checks in: scans urgent email, upcoming meetings, version drift. Self-heals if CC auto-upgraded.
jobs.notes: High frequency. max_lag tight so we don't fire stale heartbeats after sleep. The skill itself gates quiet hours.

jobs.name: Daily Summary
jobs.description: Daily 9pm — recap of what happened today, what's open, what's next. Customize this skill to your workflow.
jobs.notes: Example. You'll need to write the /daily-summary skill yourself (or copy examples/daily-recap as a starting point).

jobs.name: Weekly Rollup
jobs.description: Monday 8am — kick off the week. Customize to your needs.
jobs.notes: Example placeholder. Write your own /weekly-rollup skill or repurpose one from examples/.
